content: Clean editorial aesthetic, warm OKLCH neutrals, light mode only. Professional data-focused feel optimized for B2B sales conversations.
No AI slop patterns: no purple-blue gradients, no glassmorphism, no dark-mode-first, no cyan-on-dark. Avoid the look that screams AI demo.
OKLCH color system: background oklch(98% 0.005 80), text oklch(20% 0.01 80), muted oklch(45% 0.01 80), borders oklch(90% 0.005 80), accent oklch(35% 0.05 260).

title: Light mode only, no dark mode toggle
rationale: Target audience is B2B founders in sales conversations. Light mode is more professional and universal for demo contexts. Avoids complexity of maintaining two color schemes.

content: Transparent: show exactly what was detected. No black boxes. Build confidence through clarity.
